mapper.select:
SELECT p.payment_seq ,p.pg_provider ,p.pg_mid ,p.pg_transaction_id ,p.pg_order_id ,p.amount ,p.currency ,p.payment_method ,p.card_company ,p.card_last4 ,p.status ,p.paid_at ,p.failed_reason ,p.receipt_url ,p.raw_response::text AS raw_response ,p.pg_response_code ,p.pg_response_message ,p.verified_at ,p.webhook_received_at ,p.settle_amount ,p.settle_currency ,p.fx_rate ,p.approval_no ,p.installment_months ,p.event_pricing_seq ,pr.price_type ,pr.price_name ,p.original_amount ,p.discount_code_seq ,dc.discount_code ,p.discount_amount ,p.refunded_amount ,p.cancelled_at ,p.cancel_reason ,p.admin_memo ,p.created_at ,p.updated_at ,p.event_seq ,e.title AS event_title ,e.event_type ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,p.event_participant_seq ,ep.status AS participation_status ,p.participant_seq ,COALESCE(p.payer_name, TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', pa.first_name, NULLIF(pa.middle_name, ''), pa.last_name)) ) AS payer_name ,COALESCE(p.payer_email, pa.email) AS payer_email ,COALESCE(p.payer_country, pa.country) AS payer_country ,pa.organization_name AS payer_organization ,pa.position AS payer_position FROM event.payments p LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = p.event_seq LEFT JOIN event.event_pricing pr ON pr.event_pricing_seq = p.event_pricing_seq AND pr.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN event.event_discount_codes dc ON dc.discount_code_seq = p.discount_code_seq AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN event.event_participants ep ON ep.event_participant_seq = p.event_participant_seq LEFT JOIN event.participants pa ON pa.participant_seq = p.participant_seq WHERE p.payment_seq = #{paymentSeq}
AND (e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} OR p.event_seq IS NULL)

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,card_company ,card_last4 ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,receipt_url ,raw_response::text AS raw_response ,pg_response_code ,pg_response_message ,verified_at ,webhook_received_at ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,settle_amount ,settle_currency ,fx_rate ,approval_no ,installment_months ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_code_seq ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,cancelled_at ,cancel_reason ,admin_memo ,created_by ,created_at ,updated_by ,updated_at FROM event.payments WHERE payment_seq = #{paymentSeq} FOR UPDATE
